$schema: internal — Claude reads this file to resolve the codex -m and reasoning flags
description: Model tiers for codex exec. Edit here when models iterate; CLAUDE.md references tier names only.

quick.usage: Read-only exploration: codegraph searches, reading files, locating symbols, doc-only changes, trivial text fixes.

standard.usage: Default for any task that writes code: features, bug fixes, UI pages, CRUD, tests, smoke specs, config changes.

deep.usage: Complex or dangerous: auth/security, permission model, schema migrations, cross-module refactors, generator/dynamic-module, import/export, middleware, pkg/common.

deep: touches auth / login / session / MFA / security policy
touches permission model / Casbin / role authorization
touches database schema / migrations / seed data
standard: anything not matching quick or deep — the default
